files.contents:
{
  "name": "express-tailwind-starter",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/server.ts",
    "dev:css": "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./src/public/styles.css -o ./src/public/tailwind.css --watch",
    "dev:all": "concurrently -k -n server,css -c blue,magenta \"npm:dev\" \"npm:dev:css\"",
    "build": "tsc",
    "build:css": "tailwindcss -c tailwind.config.js -i ./src/public/styles.css -o ./src/public/tailwind.css --minify",
    "start": "node dist/server.js",
    "test": "jest",
    "test:watch": "jest --watch"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "express": "^4.19.2"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/jest": "^29.5.12",
    "@types/node": "^20.14.10",
    "@types/supertest": "^2.0.16",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.20",
    "concurrently": "^8.2.2",
    "jest": "^29.7.0",
    "postcss": "^8.4.47",
    "supertest": "^6.3.3",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.14",
    "ts-jest": "^29.2.5",
    "ts-node-dev": "^2.0.0",
    "typescript": "^5.6.3"
  },
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=18"
  }
}

Hello World

Express is running on port 4445. Tailwind CSS will load when you run the CSS build.

npm run dev:all to run server and Tailwind in watch mode.

# Express + Tailwind Starter

Overview
- Backend: Express (TypeScript)
- Port: 4445
- Frontend: Static files served from src/public
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (built to src/public/tailwind.css)

Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+

Install
- npm install

Development
- Run server and Tailwind in watch mode:
  npm run dev:all
- Then open http://localhost:4445

Alternative:
- Run only the server:
  npm run dev
- In a separate terminal, build CSS in watch mode:
  npm run dev:css

Build for production
- Build TypeScript and CSS:
  npm run build && npm run build:css
- Start compiled server:
  npm start

Testing
- Run tests:
  npm test

Configuration
- The server listens on port 4445 by default. Override with PORT env var:
  PORT=5000 npm run dev

notes: Run `npm run dev:all` to start the Express server and Tailwind CSS watcher together.
Tests use Jest with ts-jest and Supertest; run them via `npm test`.
